iconPicker.dialogDescription: Pick an emoji, or a colored icon.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: That ball went long — there's nothing at this address.

home.pageDescription: Your tennis portfolio at a glance — recent matches, form, and what's next.

emptyState.title: Welcome to Tennisfolio 🎾
emptyState.description: Your performance dashboard lands here as soon as you've logged a match — win rate, streaks, charts, and what's next.

winRateBySurface.title: Win rate by surface
winRateBySurface.description: How results vary across the surfaces you've played on.
winRateBySurface.empty: No surface breakdown yet — log matches with a surface to see this.

resultsDistribution.title: Results distribution
resultsDistribution.description: Every played match, split by result.
resultsDistribution.empty: Play your first match to see your results split here.

winRateOverTime.title: Win rate over time
winRateOverTime.description: Monthly win rate across every played match.
winRateOverTime.empty: Play a few matches to see your form trend here.

upcomingMatches.title: Upcoming matches
upcomingMatches.empty: No scheduled matches on the calendar.

matches.pageDescription: Every match you've played, with scores and derived results — plus what's on the schedule.
matches.deleteDescription: This permanently removes the match and its set scores. This can't be undone.

emptyState.title: No matches found
emptyState.description: No matches match these filters yet — try adjusting them, or log your first match.

opponentQuickCreate.title: New opponent
opponentQuickCreate.description: Add just enough to log the match — you can fill in the rest later.

clubQuickCreate.title: New club
clubQuickCreate.description: Add just enough to log the match — the surface pre-fills once you pick this club.
clubQuickCreate.name: Name

detail.invalidId: "{{id}}" is not a valid match id.
detail.noSets: No sets recorded — complete this match with a score to see the set-by-set breakdown.

matchForm.invalidId: "{{id}}" is not a valid match id.

descriptions.edit: Update the score or details — sets and result are re-derived automatically.
descriptions.complete: Add the score to turn this scheduled match into a played result.
descriptions.log: Capture a whole match — opponent, sets, and the details — from one screen.

fields.scheduleToggle: Schedule for later — save without a score
fields.scheduleModeNotice: This match will be saved to your schedule. Add the score later from the Matches page to see the result.
fields.scoreHintDefault: Your games first — fill each set you played.
fields.stageHint: Only for tournaments — e.g. QF, SF, F
fields.notesPlaceholder: How it went, what to work on…

validation.durationWhole: Duration must be a whole number of minutes.
validation.fillBothNumbers: Fill both numbers for each {{unit}}, or clear it.
validation.trailingOnly: Only the trailing sets can be left empty.
validation.enterScoreOrSchedule: Enter a score, or switch to schedule mode.

savedPanel.scheduledDescription: Saved to your schedule — add the score whenever it's played.
savedPanel.savedDescription: Here's the result, derived from the score you entered.

opponents.pageDescription: Players you've faced and your head-to-head records.
opponents.deleteDescription: This permanently removes the opponent. This can't be undone.

emptyState.title: No opponents yet
emptyState.description: Add the players you've faced to start tracking head-to-head records.

emptyState.title: No matches yet
emptyState.description: Matches played against this opponent will show up here.

detail.invalidId: "{{id}}" is not a valid opponent id.
